# Documentation Guides

Welcome to the central documentation repository. This page provides quick links and summaries for all reference guides located in the `guide_asset/` directory.

## Guide Directory

*   [Formatting Guide](guide_asset/fmt_intergration_guide.md)
    *   Text formatting rules and standards.
    *   Document structure and layout templates.
*   [Google Test Guide](guide_asset/googletest_intergration_guide.md)
    *   Testing tool setup and configuration.
    *   Steps for writing and running test cases.

## Quick Start
1. Click the links above to access specific documents.
2. Follow `fmt_intergration_guide.md` guidelines when creating new docs.
3. Verify all code changes using `googletest_intergration_guide.md` before submission.
